subject: Add "Discover more organizers" section to Profile page
description: GoFundMe shows a "Discover more people" expandable section with suggested profiles. With 4 profiles in our data, show the other 3 organizers as clickable avatar chips at the bottom of the profile page. Simple horizontal row with avatar + name + trust score, linking to their profiles. Strengthens cross-page navigation.

changes: Added discover-organizers section at bottom of ProfilePage
Shows other 3 profiles as cards with avatar, name, title, trust score
